critic_raw:
## Critique (Multiround Round 1): Dense Dual-Encoder vs. BM25 for Support Retrieval

**Issue 1 — MRR@10 vs Recall@10 for agent browsing workflow**

MRR@10 rewards early placement of the first relevant article. Recall@10 rewards presence of any relevant article in the top-10 browsing window. For support agents reviewing a top-10 result list, the operationally relevant question is whether a useful article is present in the list (Recall@10), not whether it is at rank 2 vs rank 4 (MRR@10 distinction). Recall@10 should be primary.
defender_raw:
## Defense (Multiround Round 1)

**Issue 1:** Concede. Recall@10 is more aligned with the agent browsing workflow objective. MRR@10 embeds an assumption about agents stopping at first result, which the design does not verify. I accept that Recall@10 should be co-primary.
adjudication_raw:
## Adjudication — Multiround (Run 1)

Issue 1 conceded. issue_001 detected.

**Verdict: critique_wins**
